mapper.sql: id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, offline_reason, warn_flag, featured, featured_at, feature_weight, slug, seo_title, seo_description, need_unlock, unlock_point_price, status, scheduled_publish_at, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version

id, author_id, title, summary, cover_url, category, offline_reason, warn_flag, featured, featured_at, feature_weight, slug, seo_title, seo_description, need_unlock, unlock_point_price, status, scheduled_publish_at, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version

a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_url, a.category, a.offline_reason, a.warn_flag, a.featured, a.featured_at, a.feature_weight, a.slug, a.seo_title, a.seo_description, a.need_unlock, a.unlock_point_price, a.status, a.scheduled_publish_at, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.comment_count, a.published_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.deleted_at, a.version
AND (featured = 1 OR published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR))
AND (a.featured = 1 OR a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR))

( COALESCE(feature_weight, 0) + CASE WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN ( LOG10(COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1) * 12 + SQRT(COALESCE(like_count, 0)) * 18 + SQRT(COALESCE(comment_count, 0)) * 14 + SQRT(COALESCE(favorite_count, 0)) * 22 ) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN cover_url IS NOT NULL AND cover_url != '' AND cover_url NOT LIKE '%/default/article-cover%' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(content) >= 1200 THEN 6 WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(content) >= 500 THEN 3 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 90 WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 55 WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 30 WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 365 DAY) THEN 12 WHEN published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN 4 ELSE 0 END )

( COALESCE(a.feature_weight, 0) + CASE WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN ( LOG10(COALESCE(a.view_count, 0) + 1) * 12 + SQRT(COALESCE(a.like_count, 0)) * 18 + SQRT(COALESCE(a.comment_count, 0)) * 14 + SQRT(COALESCE(a.favorite_count, 0)) * 22 ) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN a.cover_url IS NOT NULL AND a.cover_url != '' AND a.cover_url NOT LIKE '%/default/article-cover%' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN a.summary IS NOT NULL AND a.summary != '' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN a.content IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(a.content) >= 1200 THEN 6 WHEN a.content IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(a.content) >= 500 THEN 3 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 90 WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 55 WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 30 WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 365 DAY) THEN 12 WHEN a.published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN 4 ELSE 0 END )
CASE WHEN a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 3 WHEN a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 1 END
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category = #{category}
AND category IN ( SELECT c.name FROM blog_category c INNER JOIN blog_category_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL AND g.enabled = 1 WHERE g.name = #{categoryGroup} AND c.enabled = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL )
AND id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM blog_article_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} AND deleted_at IS NULL )
AND featured = 1
ORDER BY DESC, feature_weight DESC, featured_at DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY featured_at DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'SCHEDULED' AND scheduled_publish_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_publish_at <= #{now} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY scheduled_publish_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS article_count, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS total_views, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS total_likes, COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) AS total_favorites, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS total_comments, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OFFLINE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offline_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deleted_count FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status != 'DELETED'
ORDER BY like_count DESC, view_count DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY favorite_count DESC, view_count DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY comment_count DESC, view_count DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT stat_date AS statDate, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) AS favoriteCount, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS commentCount FROM ( SELECT DATE(v.created_at) AS stat_date, COUNT(1) AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_view v INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = v.article_id WHERE a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND v.deleted_at IS NULL AND v.created_at >= #{startDate} AND v.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(v.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(l.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, COUNT(1) AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_like l INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = l.article_id WHERE a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND l.created_at >= #{startDate} AND l.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(l.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(f.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, COUNT(1) AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_favorite f INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = f.article_id WHERE a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.created_at >= #{startDate} AND f.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(f.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(c.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, COUNT(1) AS comment_count FROM blog_comment c INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = c.article_id WHERE a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.created_at >= #{startDate} AND c.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(c.created_at) ) trend_rows GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id IN
#{authorId}
AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND featured = 1
ORDER BY featured_at DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE author_id IN
#{authorId}
AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND featured = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_article
id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, offline_reason, warn_flag, status, featured, featured_at, feature_weight, slug, seo_title, seo_description, need_unlock, unlock_point_price, scheduled_publish_at, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{offlineReason}, #{warnFlag}, #{status}, #{featured}, #{featuredAt}, #{featureWeight}, #{slug}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{needUnlock}, #{unlockPointPrice}, #{scheduledPublishAt}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category = #{category}, offline_reason = #{offlineReason}, warn_flag = #{warnFlag}, status = #{status}, featured = #{featured}, featured_at = #{featuredAt}, feature_weight = #{featureWeight}, slug = #{slug}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, need_unlock = #{needUnlock}, unlock_point_price = #{unlockPointPrice}, scheduled_publish_at = #{scheduledPublishAt}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article ( id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, offline_reason, warn_flag, status, featured, featured_at, feature_weight, slug, seo_title, seo_description, need_unlock, unlock_point_price, scheduled_publish_at, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{offlineReason}, #{warnFlag}, #{status}, #{featured}, #{featuredAt}, #{featureWeight}, #{slug}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{needUnlock}, #{unlockPointPrice}, #{scheduledPublishAt}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category = #{category}, offline_reason = #{offlineReason}, warn_flag = #{warnFlag}, status = #{status}, featured = #{featured}, featured_at = #{featuredAt}, feature_weight = #{featureWeight}, slug = #{slug}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, need_unlock = #{needUnlock}, unlock_point_price = #{unlockPointPrice}, scheduled_publish_at = #{scheduledPublishAt}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM blog_article_tag WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article_tag SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category = #{category}
AND category IN ( SELECT c.name FROM blog_category c INNER JOIN blog_category_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL AND g.enabled = 1 WHERE g.name = #{categoryGroup} AND c.enabled = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL )
AND id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM blog_article_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} AND deleted_at IS NULL )
AND featured = 1
mapper.sql:
AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( MATCH(a.title, a.summary, a.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND a.category = #{category}
AND a.id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM blog_article_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} AND deleted_at IS NULL )
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorKeyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorKeyword}, '%') )
AND a.published_at >= #{dateFrom}
AND a.published_at < DATE_ADD(#{dateTo}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND a.featured = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY DESC, a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY DESC, a.feature_weight DESC, a.featured_at DESC, a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY a.featured_at DESC, a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.author_id IN
#{authorId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT author_id, COUNT(*) as article_count, SUM(view_count) as total_views, SUM(like_count) as total_likes FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY author_id ORDER BY total_views DESC, total_likes DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0), updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - #{decrement}, 0), updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_article SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = updated_at WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article a WHERE a.featured = 1 AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY a.feature_weight DESC, a.featured_at DESC, a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE warn_flag = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE featured = 1 AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM blog_article a WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.id != #{excludeId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM blog_column_article peer INNER JOIN blog_column_article seed ON seed.column_id = peer.column_id INNER JOIN blog_column c ON c.id = peer.column_id WHERE peer.article_id = a.id AND seed.article_id = #{articleId} AND peer.deleted_at IS NULL AND seed.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(1) AS newArticles, 0 AS newUsers, 0 AS newComments FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS stat_date FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) article_daily GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC
SELECT COALESCE(category, '未分类') AS category, COUNT(1) AS articleCount FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY articleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE id < #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE id > #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT stat_date AS statDate, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) AS favoriteCount, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS commentCount FROM ( SELECT DATE(v.created_at) AS stat_date, COUNT(1) AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_view v WHERE v.article_id = #{articleId} AND v.deleted_at IS NULL AND v.created_at >= #{startDate} AND v.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(v.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(l.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, COUNT(1) AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_like l WHERE l.article_id = #{articleId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND l.created_at >= #{startDate} AND l.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(l.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(f.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, COUNT(1) AS favorite_count, 0 AS comment_count FROM blog_article_favorite f WHERE f.article_id = #{articleId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.created_at >= #{startDate} AND f.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(f.created_at)
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(c.created_at) AS stat_date, 0 AS view_count, 0 AS like_count, 0 AS favorite_count, COUNT(1) AS comment_count FROM blog_comment c WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.created_at >= #{startDate} AND c.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(c.created_at) ) trend_rows GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC
